name: 喵路昭昭 The long journey
short_description: In order to find the lost cat, the girl must embark on a difficult road！
detailed_description:
This is a platform jumping game similar to only up

The initial operation is very simple, just jump left and right, but after passing some levels you will learn more skills.

Double jump! Dash! Climb!

The performance may be much higher, but the consequences of each operation failure may be unbearable.

New abilities permanently unlocked

Progress will be saved automatically

Suffering and guaranteed to be challenging

A grueling challenge It’s time to brave the hardships and dangers to find cats

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
